name: py-music
description: Strubloid music theory learning platform — full-stack Python/Flask + React/Vite.

scripts.audit: npm run audit:node && npm run audit:python
scripts.check:repository: npm run check:tooling && npm run check:backend:compile && npm --prefix frontend run build-storybook:ci && npm run check:docker
scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration
scripts.test:backend:coverage: node scripts/run-python.js -m coverage run --source=backend.project -m unittest discover -s backend/project/tests -v && node scripts/run-python.js -m coverage xml -o coverage.xml && node scripts/run-python.js -m coverage report
scripts.test:coverage: npm run test:backend:coverage && npm --prefix frontend run test:coverage
scripts.test:integration: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend:e2e
scripts.prepush: npm run check:tooling && npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm run build
scripts.typecheck: npm run check:tooling && npm run check:backend && npm run check:frontend:types
scripts.validate: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm run test && npm run test:coverage && npm run build && npm run check:repository && npm run audit
